title: Neelian
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Neelian''''' was a [[Corvette/Legends|Corvette]] in the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. It fought at the [[Battle of Praesitlyn]] where it was the headquarters ship of [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and was responsible for safeguarding the troopships as they landed. It was commanded by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Luhar]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Trial]]'' {{1st}}
*[[Jedi Trial (abridged audiobook)|''Jedi Trial'' abridged audiobook]]
